steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: src/model.py updated with use_pre_norm and layers_per_block; src/train.py updated with new config params; all unit tests pass including backward compat, pre-norm + layers_per_block=2 forward-inverse consistency, and Jacobian triangularity check

steps.name: phase1_val_run
steps.acceptance: Training run on ethanol T=9 with use_pre_norm=True, layers_per_block=2, dropout=0.0 complete; VF result recorded in experiment log

steps.name: phase1_gate_check
steps.acceptance: VF >= 90% on ethanol T=9 (proceed to Phase 2) OR investigation of remaining gap documented

steps.name: phase2_padding_validation
steps.acceptance: Ethanol T=9 and T=21 runs complete; |VF(T=9) - VF(T=21)| < 10pp documented

steps.name: phase3_optimize
steps.acceptance: OPTIMIZE protocol complete (SANITY angle + HEURISTICS/SCALE if needed); best multi-molecule result documented

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice; pre-merge checks pass

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_009; pre-merge checks pass
